title: euodia lepta var. chunii
intro: Euodia lepta var. chunii, also known as Sichuan euodia, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Euodia lepta var. chunii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of Euodia lepta var. chunii include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
